title: Melitta Original Coffee Filters, 40 per Box, Size 1 x 4/40
features: Original Melitta coffee filters with multi-layer filtration of three patented Aroma Zones, each of different counts of perforation density
Durably constructed filters with high resistance to tearing, Double-seam design, Chlorine-Free
Flavour optimisation thanks to multi-tiered micro-perforation concept
Lower/internal Aroma Zone for entry of first-layer aromas, Middle Aroma Zone for consistency and refinement, Top/outer Aroma Zone for bitterness prevention and guarantee of balance
Contents: 1 x Melitta Original Coffee Filters, 40 per Package, Size 1 x 4, Art. 6722913, Box Weight and Dimensions: 99.8 g, 2.4 x 13.1 x 20.2 cm, Natural Brown
description: From the manufacturer 40 Natural-Brown Coffee Filter Bags 100% Compostable with Certification from the Forest Stewardship Council Discover a balanced, aromatic taste experience with Melitta Original Coffee Filters. Three patented Aromazones with specially arranged Aromapores ensure that your filter coffee develops its flavour perfectly. Whether you filter your coffee by machine or hand, you need a reliable filter bag that ensures the optimal, smooth taste. Melitta has been a thoughtful leader in filter coffee since 1908, so it is no surprise that the company works to meet the standards of the Forest Stewardship Council. These bags are 100% compostable and maintain sturdiness with their tear-resistant configuration. Melitta: Pioneers of Coffee Industry Since 1908 Melitta has led the coffee industry since 1908, when founder Melitta Bentz made the world's first paper filter bags. Now 20 billion filter bags are used world-wide on a yearly basis, and this conscientious German organisation continues to lead the way in coffee-related innovation. From the best filter makers and fully automatic bean-to-cup machines to useful accessories for the pour-over hand-filtration method, the Melitta brand continues to design and retail coffee products of the utmost quality. At a glance: Patented filtration system using multi-layer Aroma Zones of varied perforation density Doubly-seamed design for high resistance to tearing Chlorine-Free and FSC Certified Flavour optimisation thanks to multi-tiered micro-perforation concept 1 x 4 Size 40 filters per box AromaPor Paper The special characteristic of this paper is its micro-perforations. These perforations ensure that only the finest flavours make their way into your coffee, allowing a release of optimal collective flavour. 3 Aroma Zones Perforation frequency varies by zone in this system of multi-layer filtration. The top zone prevents bitterness and guarantees a balanced aroma. The middle zone supports even, consistent brewing while refining the coffee's aroma. The lower zone or "pre-brewing zone" unfolds the first aromas in your coffee. This is a 3-2-1-system of Balancing, Refining, and Unfolding. Natural Brown and White While Melitta's natural brown coffee filters are untreated, their white coffee filters are whitened using natural oxygen. While the two colours appear different, there is no difference in taste between them. Naturally, all of Melitta coffee filters are 100% biodegradable.
